properties.sql.select_statement:
select customerkey, state from em.dimcustomer
where currentflag = 'Y'

select customerkey, datekey, salestotal
from em.factsales
where 
datekey >= #datekey_start# and datekey <= #datekey_end#

pipelines.description: Prepare data for load to Region SalesSummary table
